description: validator: assert a repo has git history and/or a wired remote (read-only)
rules: the gate IS the exit code: 0 iff REQUIRE is satisfied, else 1
usage: Set REPO_DIR (+ optional REQUIRE = history | remote | history+remote, default history+remote). Output: git_verify.json.
limitation: Checks presence of history / a wired remote only - not remote reachability, push access, or content.
